days.title: Arrival in Paris
days.subtitle: First Impressions of the City of Light

timeline.title: Arrive at Gare du Nord
timeline.detail: Your Eurostar train arrives at Gare du Nord station. Follow the signs to the metro or taxis for your next destination.

timeline.title: Check in to Hôtel Eiffel Seine
timeline.detail: Settle into this charming hotel within walking distance of the Eiffel Tower. The hotel features unique art deco design and offers cozy accommodation.

timeline.title: Lunch at Café de Flore
timeline.detail: Enjoy a classic French lunch at the historic Café de Flore, known for its literary clientele. Make sure to try their famous croque monsieur.

timeline.title: Seine River Cruise
timeline.detail: Take a scenic boat cruise along the Seine River to admire the stunning architecture of Paris, including the Notre-Dame Cathedral and the Louvre.

timeline.title: Visit the Eiffel Tower
timeline.detail: Head to the Eiffel Tower and take the elevator to the summit for breathtaking views of the city. Pre-book your tickets online to avoid long queues.

timeline.title: Dinner at Le Procope
timeline.detail: Experience dining at Le Procope, the oldest café in Paris. Savor traditional French cuisine, including boeuf bourguignon, in a historic setting.

localTips: Buy a Paris Visite pass for unlimited travel on public transport for your stay.
Book Eiffel Tower tickets in advance at www.toureiffel.paris to save time.
Consider a Seine cruise combo ticket that includes a discounted meal.

days.title: Exploring Parisian Art
days.subtitle: From Museums to Montmartre

timeline.title: Breakfast at Angelina
timeline.detail: Start your day with a famous hot chocolate and pastries at Angelina, known for its luxurious décor and delightful breakfast options.

timeline.title: Louvre Museum Visit
timeline.detail: Explore the Louvre Museum and see iconic artworks like the Mona Lisa. Purchase skip-the-line tickets to maximize your time inside.

timeline.title: Lunch at Le Fumoir
timeline.detail: Relish modern French cuisine at Le Fumoir, conveniently located near the Louvre. Try their seasonal dishes and enjoy the cozy ambience.

timeline.title: Montmartre Walk
timeline.detail: Wander through the charming streets of Montmartre. Visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica and enjoy panoramic views of the city from its steps.

timeline.title: Visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica
timeline.detail: Explore the Sacré-Cœur Basilica and admire its stunning architecture. The interior mosaics and the serene gardens are must-see spots.

timeline.title: Dinner at Chez Janou
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delightful Provencal dinner at Chez Janou, known for its lavender-infused dishes and charming courtyard.

localTips: Check if a free guided tour is available at the Louvre on your visit day.
Wear comfortable shoes for walking in Montmartre’s hilly streets.
Many cafes in Montmartre offer great views, perfect for a coffee break.

days.title: Cultural Paris
days.subtitle: From Notre-Dame to Latin Quarter

timeline.title: Breakfast at Le Pain Quotidien
timeline.detail: Enjoy a healthy breakfast at Le Pain Quotidien with organic bread and pastries to kickstart your day.

timeline.title: Visit Notre-Dame Cathedral
timeline.detail: Explore the iconic Notre-Dame Cathedral. Relax in the square and enjoy the stunning Gothic architecture of this historic landmark.

timeline.title: Explore the Latin Quarter
timeline.detail: Stroll through the Latin Quarter, famed for its winding streets and vibrant atmosphere. Enjoy the lively cafes and shops along the way.

timeline.title: Lunch at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte
timeline.detail: Savor a steak-frites lunch with the secret sauce at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, a Parisian classic that is always a treat.
timeline.mapQuery: Le Relais de l'Entrecôte, Paris, France

timeline.title: Visit Musée d'Orsay
timeline.detail: Explore the Musée d'Orsay, home to major Impressionist masterpieces. Grab a museum guide to make the most of your visit.

timeline.title: Return to Hôtel Eiffel Seine
timeline.detail: Head back to your hotel to relax and freshen up before departure. Take a moment to enjoy the beautiful hotel ambiance.

timeline.title: Dinner at Café des Musées
timeline.detail: Enjoy your farewell dinner at Café des Musées, a charming bistro serving traditional French dishes. Don’t miss their delicious duck confit.

localTips: Check for free entry days at museums; often they are free on the first Sunday of the month.
Pay attention to local transport schedules as they may change on weekends.
Consider reserving museum tickets online for a faster entry.

hotels.name: Hôtel Eiffel Seine
hotels.note: 10-minute walk to Eiffel Tower, comfortable stay.
hotels.address: 3 Quai de la Bourdonnais, 75007 Paris, France

urgent.note: Pre-book tickets at www.toureiffel.paris to avoid queues.

urgent.label: Book Louvre Tickets
urgent.note: Pre-book tickets at www.louvre.fr for quickest entry.
